component.name: FlipStack
component.summary: Master any subject with Spaced Repetition (SRS)

description.p: FlipStack is a modern, open-source flashcard app built for the GNOME desktop. It combines the efficiency of Spaced Repetition (SR) with a clean, native Linux interface to help you master any subject.

ul.li: Smart Study Modes: Spaced Repetition, Cram, Reverse and Shuffle
Activity Dashboard: Visualize your consistency with heatmaps and streaks
Performance Dashboard: Visualize your performance with advanced graphs and visualizations for each deck.
Deck Management: Organize, import (CSV/Anki), and export your decks and cards.
Rich Editor: Support for images, audio, and rich text (Markdown)
Modern UI/UX: Dark/Light modes, dynamic font families and size adjustments, SFX

screenshot.caption: Rich Text Cards With Audio and Image Support

ul.li: Smart Global Search: Double-click search results to jump directly to the editor with row highlighting.
Quick Actions: Added a quick-edit button to search results for immediate changes.
Improved Sorting: Added A-Z and Z-A sorting in the Deck Editor, now ignoring markdown symbols for better accuracy.
Safety First: Added a confirmation modal when deleting cards to prevent accidental data loss.
Bug Fixes: Fixed "ghost input" bugs in Study Mode where edits could trigger card flips.
Stability: Fixed a crash related to card highlighting in the editor.
